pr.title: Further Sysdolphin matching and splitting out of some stage .c file assembly
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Split a large assembly region out of asm/text_2.s into asm/text_3.s with stage-specific assembly files inserted between them, updated ldscript.lcf ordering/FORCEFILES accordingly, and advanced Sysdolphin matching by converting small AObj/ObjAlloc routines and replacing anonymous objalloc call targets with HSD_* names. The PR body explicitly notes the split point was chosen because asserts and lookup tables make it a good future anchor for labeling stage.c files.

key_files.reason: Large assembly file was split; most of its previous contents were removed or relocated.
New continuation assembly file holding a large moved text region.
New stage assembly slice inserted between text_2 and text_3.
New stage assembly slice inserted between text_2 and text_3.
New stage assembly slice inserted between text_2 and text_3 and forced in linker script.
New stage assembly slice inserted between text_2 and text_3 and forced in linker script.
Updated object ordering to place grgarden, grvenom, grtest, grkinokoroute, and text_3 after text_2; added objalloc_asm.o and moved FORCEFILES block.
Matched HSD_AObjRemove and HSD_AObjFree in C and updated objalloc call names.
New C file adding matched HSD_ObjSetHeap.
Added objheap struct and ObjAlloc function declarations.
Renamed from asm/objalloc.s and relabeled ObjAlloc assembly functions.
Added .global labels for multiple previously unlabeled function starts.

what_changed: Split asm/text_2.s into asm/text_2.s plus new asm/text_3.s, with new stage assembly files grgarden.s, grvenom.s, grtest.s, and grkinokoroute.s placed in the link order between them.

Updated ldscript.lcf .text order to include grgarden.o, grvenom.o, grtest.o, grkinokoroute.o, text_3.o, and objalloc_asm.o; FORCEFILES was rewritten at the end and includes grtest.o and grkinokoroute.o.
Renamed asm/objalloc.s to asm/objalloc_asm.s while adding C coverage in src/sysdolphin/objalloc.c.
Added HSD_ObjSetHeap in C, which initializes lbl_80406E48 fields top, curr, remain, and size from a pointer and size.
Extended objalloc.h with objheap and declarations for HSD_ObjSetHeap, HSD_ObjAllocAddFree, and HSD_ObjAlloc.
Converted HSD_AObjRemove and HSD_AObjFree from inline assembly to C with #pragma peephole on.
Changed many branch comments/call targets from anonymous func_8037ABC8 and func_8037AD20 to HSD_ObjAlloc and HSD_ObjFree across Sysdolphin assembly files.
Relabeled func_8037A968 as HSD_ObjAllocAddFree and func_8037ABC8 as HSD_ObjAlloc in objalloc assembly.
Added global labels in asm/code_80005940.s such as func_8000594C, func_80005994, func_800059DC, func_80005A30, func_80005A88, func_80005AC4, func_80005AE4, func_80005B00, and func_80005B18.
Changed an AObj float extern from mutable f32 to const f32 for lbl_804DE438.
smart_moves: Used a natural split point identified by asserts and lookup tables, making the assembly organization more searchable and setting up future stage.c labeling work.
Preserved link order explicitly in ldscript.lcf while carving stage files out of a monolithic text file, reducing risk of address drift.
Introduced C for small, well-understood routines first: HSD_ObjSetHeap, HSD_AObjRemove, and HSD_AObjFree are compact and semantically clear.
Kept unmatched ObjAlloc code in a renamed asm companion file, objalloc_asm.s, while moving only matched code into objalloc.c.
Propagated the newly understood HSD_ObjAlloc/HSD_ObjFree names through many caller comments, increasing cross-file navigability without changing instruction bytes.
Used #pragma peephole on around C replacements in aobj.c, indicating compiler-control tactics were needed to match generated code.
decomp_lessons: When splitting large assembly files, update linker order in the same PR and keep newly extracted files adjacent to their original address range.
Assert strings and lookup tables are strong anchors for identifying and naming stage-specific files.
A safe incremental pattern is to rename the remaining assembly file with an _asm suffix and add a new C file for matched functions in the same subsystem.
Once a core utility function is identified, update all callsite labels/comments across assembly to improve future matching context.
Small null-check-heavy free/remove routines can often be converted from asm to C once struct fields and called destructors are known.
Header work should accompany matched C: adding objheap and ObjAlloc prototypes made later ObjAlloc matching reusable.
naming_conventions: Sysdolphin object allocator symbols use the HSD_Obj* prefix: HSD_ObjSetHeap, HSD_ObjAllocAddFree, HSD_ObjAlloc, HSD_ObjFree.
Animation object symbols use HSD_AObj* names: HSD_AObjRemove, HSD_AObjFree, HSD_AObjAlloc.
Remaining non-decompiled assembly companions may be named with an _asm suffix, as in objalloc_asm.s.
Stage assembly files use gr-prefixed lowercase stage names, e.g. grgarden.s, grvenom.s, grtest.s, grkinokoroute.s.
Previously anonymous function starts in assembly were promoted to .global func_ADDRESS labels when they represented callable functions.
Float constants may be declared const when evidence indicates read-only data, as with extern const f32 lbl_804DE438.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: C-matched HSD_AObjRemove uses early return on NULL, removes all FObjs if present, clears aobj->fobj, unrefs hsd_obj if present, clears aobj->hsd_obj, then calls HSD_AObjFree.
C-matched HSD_AObjFree returns on NULL and otherwise calls HSD_ObjFree with allocator data lbl_804C0880 and the aobj cast to HSD_ObjAllocLink.
HSD_ObjSetHeap match writes curr and top to the incoming pointer value and writes remain and size to the incoming size.
Used #pragma push / #pragma peephole on / #pragma pop around matched AObj C functions.
Relabeled branch targets/call comments from func_8037ABC8 to HSD_ObjAlloc and from func_8037AD20 to HSD_ObjFree without evidence of instruction changes.
Added .global labels at known address boundaries in code_80005940.s to expose callable units for future references.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the provided PR slice.
The only explicit future-work note is from the PR body: the chosen split region is a good spot for labeling stage.c files due to asserts and lookup tables, but that was deferred.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that label the stage.c files around grgarden, grvenom, grtest, or grkinokoroute using asserts and lookup tables.
Find later PRs that complete HSD_ObjFree or remaining ObjAlloc functions left in objalloc_asm.s.
Find follow-up changes to objalloc.h adding HSD_ObjFree prototype or refining objheap/HSD_ObjAllocData layouts.
Find later AObj matching PRs that build on HSD_AObjRemove, HSD_AObjFree, or HSD_AObjAlloc.
Search for subsequent renames of func_8000594C and nearby code_80005940 functions.
